ref: Seir was from the Horite tribe that had lived in Edom before the time of Esau. The clans that had descended from him were Lotan, Shobal, Zibeon, Anah,
text: Seyir nɛ e la Horaiebi be esa na be mbinyɛnbi nɛ b daa wɔ efuli na so nde. Lotan nɛ Shobal nɛ Zibiɔn nɛ Ana,
translated: Seyir went to Horaiebi's place and came along the road with them. Lotan, Shobal, Zibiɔn, and Ana.
